name: assets-3d
description: Curated CC0 3D model sources and text-to-GLB pipelines for three/world3d lectures. Skill-only — no runtime deps. Teaches procedural-first via the three pack, then CC0 libraries and AI generation.

skill.loadWhen: the lesson needs 3D models (GLB/glTF) for world3d or world3dRpg scenes — sourcing CC0 art or generating meshes
